notes: Per Icy Veins, Rune of Re-Origination from Heroic Throne of Thunder remains BiS — double-check before farming old content. Capacitive Primal Diamond is the legendary meta. Drops listed are 25 Heroic; Normal/Flex versions are the same items at lower item level. Draft compiled from Icy Veins MoP Classic guides.
